text: Being here, I feel a curious blend of anticipation and wonder. The first space is sparse and open, inviting contemplation—with its clean lines, quiet corners, and a hint of possibility. The second space brims with energy and intellect—walls alive with words and diagrams, urging me to consider progress and the evolving relationship between humans and machines. I sense both the excitement of innovation and the humility of learning. Every detail seems to ask: how will we shape, and be shaped, by the world we create?
